subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the fragrances of God! Verily I read thy well-composed letter containing wondrous meanings
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی قرئت نمیقتک البدیعه المعانی و الانشاء و حمدت الله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @high station of the true believer, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
